summary: Planned Phase 8 (New Skills & Personas) — 10 tasks: 5 new graph-powered skills (impact-analysis, dependency-health, hotspot-detector, test-advisor, knowledge-mapper), 2 new personas (Graph Maintainer, Codebase Health Analyst), 3 existing persona updates. All documentation/configuration — no TypeScript code.
pending: Task 7: Create Codebase Health Analyst persona
Task 8: Update 3 existing personas with graph skills
concerns: Skills are documentation that guides AI agents — quality of SKILL.md determines agent effectiveness
Persona YAML must match existing schema (version 1) or agent-definition generator may fail
New skills use existing MCP graph tools — no new TS implementation needed
decisions: All 5 skills use existing graph MCP tools (query_graph, get_impact, find_context_for, etc.)
Each skill has SKILL.md (workflow) + skill.yaml (metadata) per existing convention
Graph Maintainer persona: daily scheduled scan + on_commit to main
Codebase Health Analyst persona: weekly scheduled + on_pr for large PRs (>10 files)
Existing personas gain graph skills additively — no existing skills removed
